# onecloud Provider



## Example Usage

```terraform
terraform {
  required_providers {
    onecloud = {
      source  = "onecloud"
      version = "1.0"
    }
  }
}

provider "onecloud" {
  api_token = var.onecloud_token
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `api_token` (String, Sensitive)

### Optional

- `api_url` (String)
